title.en: Chayei Sarah: How to Choose a Spouse — Lessons from Eliezer's Mission
title.zh: 夏叶萨拉：如何选择配偶——以利以谢使命的启示
title.he: חיי שרה: איך לבחור בן/בת זוג - לקחים משליחותו של אליעזר

description.en: The servant's journey to find a wife for Isaac and what the Torah teaches about identifying good character in a partner.
description.zh: 仆人为以撒寻找妻子的旅程，以及托拉关于识别伴侣良好品格的教导。
description.he: מסעו של העבד למצוא אישה ליצחק ומה התורה מלמדת על זיהוי אופי טוב בבן/בת זוג.

cultural_parallels: Traditional Chinese courtship through character observation
Tang Dynasty marriage customs emphasizing family compatibility

biblical_figures.name: Abraham
biblical_figures.role: Patriarch who sends servant to find wife for Isaac

biblical_figures.name: Eliezer
biblical_figures.role: Abraham's trusted servant sent on the mission

biblical_figures.name: Rebecca
biblical_figures.role: The chosen bride who demonstrates exceptional character

key_lessons: Character matters more than convenience in marriage
Actions reveal true character better than words
Shared values are the foundation of lasting relationships
Divine providence works through human effort
Both parties must freely consent to marriage

header_image.style: Chinese ink wash / shan shui landscape
header_image.description: Ancient well with palm trees in foreground, figure with camels approaching while another draws water, rolling desert hills fading into misty background
header_image.color_palette: Earth tones - ochre, sepia, soft grays
